disabled_capabilities.reason: Only sanitized structural summaries are retained; body text and account-private material are not saved.
disabled_capabilities.strategy: Disabled by default and never auto-executed.
disabled_capabilities.next_step: Generate a safe remediation plan after reviewing disabled capabilities with: node src/entrypoints/operator/capabilities.mjs list dahlia --status disabled. Immediate alternatives may be limited summary or draft preview; otherwise implement a site-specific adapter path and rerun validation. Ordinary confirmation cannot enable private-message detail, message sending, account mutation, or other forced-disabled actions.
disabled_capabilities.confirmation_blocked_reason: 该能力默认禁用，普通确认不能开启。

partial_success_reasons: 1 high-risk write, private, or account capabilities are disabled by default.
Sitemap discovery reached its configured limit; remaining sitemaps were not collected.
Strict privacy mode skips sensitive personal capabilities.
The route appears to require dynamic collection, which was not enabled for this build.
auth_explanation_zh: 本次未使用认证采集，只构建公开页面和公开能力。
未发现缺少登录证据的候选能力。
没有认证能力被有限启用。
1 个能力因风险策略被禁用或限制。
已保存 45 个公开页面的受控页面材料，并已脱敏敏感赋值和脚本正文。
没有保存 cookie、token、Authorization header、浏览器 profile、storage 材料、原始网络 payload 或私密正文。

sensitive_read.description: Confirms only limited sanitized structure scanning; unsanitized/private material remains unsaved.

draft_write.description: Confirms draft preparation only; final submit/send actions remain disabled.

disabled.next_step: Select disabled capabilities in the post-build interaction to write capability_remediation_plan.json. Immediate entries can run only as limited summary or draft preview; adapter entries require explicit site-specific adapter validation before use.

next_steps: For disabled capabilities, write a safe remediation plan: immediate entries use limited summaries or draft previews; adapter entries need explicit site adapter validation before use.
Review disabled capabilities: node src/entrypoints/operator/capabilities.mjs list dahlia --status disabled.
Use the enabled low-risk read-only capabilities now.
